/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/liblib_rbc.a CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/adv_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/advertiser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/ble_mac_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/ble_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/guide_graph_facade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_rbc.dir/src/robot_info.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/liblib_rbc.a
